goals.description: Execute the final upload and hit submit on the scholarship application immediately. Do not re-read; do not tweak. The goal is a binary win/loss, and I am choosing 'win' right now.
goals.rationale: Achievement (0.5) overrides everything. My impulsive nature demands immediate closure to secure the funding before my focus degrades further. Assertiveness means cutting off any internal debate about 'perfection'—it's a trap. Social friction or fatigue are irrelevant noise.

goals.rationale: The dopamine tax is too high right now. My short planning horizon dictates that if I engage with the game now, I risk losing the momentum needed to actually finish the submission. It can wait until I've proven I can survive the crash.
